hero.eyebrow: MasterHub — your marketplace for trusted professionals
hero.title: Find Trusted Construction & Repair Services in Kazakhstan
hero.body: MasterHub connects you with verified contractors and specialists across Kazakhstan. Post a request or browse services, compare real ratings and reviews, agree on a fair price, and hire with confidence — all in one place.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our platform makes it easy to connect clients with trusted construction companies and service providers across Kazakhstan.
howItWorks.step1Text: Select your city or region in Kazakhstan to find construction companies and service providers operating near you. This helps ensure faster response times and local expertise.
howItWorks.step2Text: Choose the type of service you need and provide basic project details such as scope, budget, or timeline. This allows providers to understand your request accurately.
howItWorks.step3Text: Compare offers, view company profiles, ratings, and reviews, then choose the contractor that best fits your needs. Start your project with confidence and leave feedback after completion.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Browse popular construction services and find verified companies and professionals ready to complete your project.
services.empty: No services in this category yet.
services.loadError: Could not load services. Please try again later.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: We are a digital platform that connects clients with trusted construction companies and service providers across Kazakhstan. Our goal is to make construction, renovation, and installation services more accessible, transparent, and reliable for everyone.
about.feature1Text: Our support team is always ready to assist clients and service providers with questions, project issues, and platform guidance.
about.feature2Text: We promote clear pricing and honest offers, allowing users to compare services and choose the best option without hidden costs.
about.feature3Text: Our platform operates across multiple cities and regions of Kazakhstan, helping users find local professionals wherever they are.

footer.tagline: Our vision is to simplify construction services and help businesses grow their sales.
